name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: REAL news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I need your help getting the REAL NEWS to the people. |

Friend, You hear the fake news every single day. It comes from the media, the Left, and out-of-touch Hollywood elites. But here is the real news: they are NEVER going to stop. Over the next four years, we are going to have to cut through the noise to ensure the REAL NEWS about our great movement gets to the American people. Friend, I know you’re dedicated to getting our positive message above the hatred and nasty attacks spread by the fake news media. Now with just 3 days left until the RNC’s February FEC-mandated deadline, I’m counting on you to help us fight back -- and fight back hard. CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $25 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT You, and millions of Americans like you, made your voice heard during our historic election, but now the fake news media is trying to silence you and distort our message. Just like during the election, I will fight back no matter what. But I can’t do it alone. So please, contribute whatever you can to the RNC today to help me cut through the media’s noise and deliver the REAL NEWS to the American people. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States
CONTRIBUTE $50

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecbbaBALjQHSAeCKdWfaCU1rDRMN6aaaaKTUrBMLDISna?t=2@77838&f=cqvjkmht58_fnZjk.dnn&k=r&w=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

CONTRIBUTE $100
---------------

name: Team Kaine
subject: you didn't want to sign Tim's card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek -- Tim's birthday is tomorrow. 7,918 supporters have already signed his birthday card from Anne and the team. **It would mean a lot to Tim if we could get him 10,000 birthday wishes!**

**[Will you add your name and wish Tim a very Happy Birthday?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=aT%2BPk%2BbiRiDKjjdAG%2BUuk2ePz1mtJKyQ)**

| [](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=95JO7VdhCoraBaWk%2BIDAS2ePz1mtJKyQ)
---

Thanks,

Team Kaine
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gc1GGTAlpe7pg8xqd0N0bGePz1mtJKyQ)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tv8DeJnQd8tyOWnuwf0Hy2RyBB%2BBaBWC).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Team DSCC
subject: Invite: Lunch with Elizabeth Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Elizabeth Warren is saving you a seat to have lunch in Washington, D.C. We can't wait to announce the lucky supporter who will be selected to win this free trip!
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170225-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170225-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170225-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170225-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**A quick note on donations, friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170225-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Derivative of Michael Davidson [Photo 1](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e360/2b07114c/45c677e0/736adda1/57334525/VEsA/ "https://www.flickr.com/photos/hillaryclinton/29638858932")[CC BY-SA 2.0.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e360/2b07114c/45c677e0/736adda0/57334525/VEsB/ "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win, and will not improve chances of winning.

Void where prohibited. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents, who are legal residents of 50 United States, the District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Entries must be received between February 23 and March 2, 2017. You may enter by **[contributing here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e360/2b07114c/45c677e0/736adda3/57334525/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017")**. Alternatively, you can enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e360/2b07114c/45c677e0/736adda2/57334525/VEsP/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/meet-elizabeth-warren-032017"). One winner will be selected to attend lunch with Elizabeth Warren and will receive the following prize package: a round-trip ticket within the continental U.S. to Washington, D.C., hotel accommodations for one, and lunch with Senator Elizabeth Warren (approximate retail value of prize package $1,000). Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e360/2b07114c/45c677e0/736add9d/57334525/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.dscc.org/lunch-with-elizabeth-warren-rules"). Sponsor: DSCC, 120 Maryland Ave NE, Washington, DC 20002.

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e360/2b07114c/45c677e0/736add9c/57334525/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e360/2b07114c/45c677e0/736add9f/57334525/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e360/2b07114c/45c677e0/736add9e/57334525/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c599/4067b0a/2d76706f9/7e7dbd76/967432052/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170225_dnc_sg3&source=em_20170225_dnc_sg3"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c599/4067b0a/2d76706f9/7e7dbd77/967432052/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170225_dnc_sg3&source=em_20170225_dnc_sg3"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c599/4067b0a/2d76706f9/7e7dbd75/967432052/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170225_dnc_sg3&source=em_20170225_dnc_sg3"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Trump=20Headquarters?=
subject: President Trump broke huge records
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
But did you even hear the media report on it? |

Friend, As our Party’s new Finance Director, I’m proud to announce that we ended our first month of the Trump presidency with a record-setting January... ...But you probably never heard mainstream media report on it. And you better believe that if Democrats outraise us this month, the media will talk about it for weeks. Our February FEC-mandated deadline is now just 3 days away. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, $10, or $5 to help before our February FEC end-of-month deadline. If we let Democrats outraise us, the media will accuse President Trump of having lost the trust and support of the American people. They’ll say the millions of hardworking American citizens who drove President Trump to victory in 2016 have abandoned our movement. You and I know that’s completely false. But we need to prove it. That’s why these FEC deadlines are so important. We need to end every single month STRONG. So please, make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, $10, or $5 to help before our February FEC end-of-month deadline. Thank you, Richard Walters Finance Director
CONTRIBUTE $50

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgbaBAL8QHSBeCKfWfaCWZiDRMN6aaaaK0LzBMLD2Ppa?o=7@2C2Bw&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=i&r=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

clean_body: But did you even hear the media report on it? | Friend, As our Party’s new Finance Director, I’m proud to announce that we ended our first month of the Trump presidency with a record-setting January... ...But you probably never heard mainstream media report on it. And you better believe that if Democrats outraise us this month, the media will talk about it for weeks. Our February FEC-mandated deadline is now just 3 days away. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, $10, or $5 to help before our February FEC end-of-month deadline. If we let Democrats outraise us, the media will accuse President Trump of having lost the trust and support of the American people. They’ll say the millions of hardworking American citizens who drove President Trump to victory in 2016 have abandoned our movement. You and I know that’s completely false. But we need to prove it. That’s why these FEC deadlines are so important. We need to end every single month STRONG. So please, make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, $10, or $5 to help before our February FEC end-of-month deadline. Thank you, Richard Walters Finance Director CONTRIBUTE $50 Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

name: Tom Perez
subject: Let's organize, fight, and win
body:
I'm ready to get started
---
**Stand with Tom, and make an investment in the future of our party. Pitch in $3 or more today:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ac8/3104504775/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd")****
This is a "where were ya?" moment. Years from now, our children and grandchildren will ask us where we were when Trump and the GOP attacked the core values of our country and our party.

I vowed after November 8th, 2016 that I would do whatever I could to move our party forward, and I'm honored to step into this new role as Chair of the DNC today.

**[I want to be able to say I did everything in my power to fight back. How about you?](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ac9/3104504775/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+I+want+to+be+able+to+say+I+did+everythin&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd")**

If we're going to organize and fight and win, it's going to take folks like you at every level. We need to strengthen our team from the grassroots up to build the party that empowers every single Democrat to fight for our progressive values and vision of opportunity and optimism.

Our only chance at winning in 2017, 2018, and beyond -- not only at the national level, but at every level -- is to be united in a common purpose. And that has to start now.

I'm ready to get started on all of the hard work we have ahead of us. If you're with me, pitch in $3 or more right now.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ad6/3104504775/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ad7/3104504775/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ad4/3104504775/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ad5/3104504775/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ad2/3104504775/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ad3/3104504775/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd")
** Thanks -- I look forward to working with you!

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ad0/3104504775/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ad1/3104504775/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8ade/3104504775/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5af/4067b0a/2d6a86b1a/7e7d8adf/3104504775/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170225_tp_nd&source=em_20170225_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: contests@dscc.org
subject: Hi, I'll book your free trip to meet Elizabeth Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I'm booking our lucky contest winner's free trip to have lunch with Elizabeth Warren in Washington, D.C. Can't wait to tell you the details!
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170225-Contests_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

My name is Janie and I can't tell you how much fun it is to call and let someone know they've won a DSCC contest -- especially when it involves a free trip to D.C. to meet with Elizabeth Warren!

Grassroots members across the country have already entered for their chance to join Senator Warren for an unforgettable lunch -- but there's still time for YOU to throw your hat in the ring.

**[Pitch in any amount and your name will be automatically entered for your chance to join Elizabeth Warren for lunch (and work with me on booking your flight)!>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170225-Contests_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

With everything that Donald Trump is doing to rollback what we've fought so hard for, we need all hands on deck -- and I know Elizabeth is excited to talk to you about the fights ahead.

So don't wait to enter to win this amazing trip, friend! **Your contribution will automatically enter you in the contest to have lunch with Elizabeth Warren (and it helps elect Senate Democrats to fight alongside her):**

**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170225-Contests_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Best of luck,

Janie
Executive Assistant

P.S. If you've already entered, don't worry, I see you. But the more times you **[donate before the deadline](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170225-Contests_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")** , the more times you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win lunch with Elizabeth and a trip to D.C.!

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win, and will not improve chances of winning.

Void where prohibited. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents, who are legal residents of 50 United States, the District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Entries must be received between February 23 and March 2, 2017. You may enter by **[contributing here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e36b/2b07114c/45d05628/736ad9b9/296832987/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017")**. Alternatively, you can enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e36b/2b07114c/45d05628/736ad9b8/296832987/VEsA/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/meet-elizabeth-warren-032017"). One winner will be selected to attend lunch with Elizabeth Warren and will receive the following prize package: a round-trip ticket within the continental U.S. to Washington, D.C., hotel accommodations for one, and lunch with Senator Elizabeth Warren (approximate retail value of prize package $1,000). Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e36b/2b07114c/45d05628/736ad9bb/296832987/VEsB/ "http://www.dscc.org/lunch-with-elizabeth-warren-rules"). Sponsor: DSCC, 120 Maryland Ave NE, Washington, DC 20002.

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e36b/2b07114c/45d05628/736ad9ba/296832987/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e36b/2b07114c/45d05628/736ad9b5/296832987/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e36b/2b07114c/45d05628/736ad9b4/296832987/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
